seoTitle: How to Add Flip Cards to Squarespace Easily (2026)
metaDescription: Make your Squarespace site more interactive with flip cards for products, team bios, or testimonials. Here's how to add them.
intro: Static pages can only hold visitor attention for so long, which is where interactive elements like flip cards come in. This guide walks through adding flip cards to your Squarespace site, a compact and visually engaging way to present products, team members, testimonials, or services.

steps.heading: Access the Squarespace Editor for flip cards
steps.body: Open the Squarespace Editor to get to the section where you'll build and place your flip cards.

steps.heading: Create and customize your flip cards
steps.body: Follow the step-by-step process for building flip cards and adjusting them to fit your content and design.

steps.heading: Apply best practices for visual design
steps.body: Use recommended design practices to keep your flip cards visually appealing and easy for visitors to interact with.

steps.heading: Choose the right use cases for flip cards
steps.body: Consider where flip cards work best on your site, such as showcasing products, team members, testimonials, or services.

steps.heading: Integrate flip cards into your existing layout
steps.body: Fit the flip cards into your current page layouts and customize them to match your brand identity.

faq.question: What are flip cards used for on a Squarespace site?
faq.answer: Flip cards are an interactive design feature well suited for showcasing products, team members, testimonials, or services in a compact format.

faq.question: Do flip cards work with my existing Squarespace layout?
faq.answer: Yes, the tutorial covers integrating flip cards into your existing layouts and customizing them to fit your brand identity.

faq.question: Are flip cards beginner-friendly to set up?
faq.answer: Yes, the guide walks through the process step by step, starting from accessing the Squarespace Editor.

faq.question: Why would I use flip cards instead of regular content blocks?
faq.answer: Flip cards present information in a more engaging, interactive way, which can encourage visitors to spend more time on your site.
